response.justification: While Bogdan has strong technical credentials with 19+ years of software engineering experience and recent exposure to AI infrastructure, he lacks the demonstrated AI/ML expertise and strategic advisory experience required for a director-level Principal Engineer role. His career shows broad technical depth but not the specialized AI focus or strategic customer engagement needed. The MCP work at re:cinq is promising but too recent (one month) to constitute deep AI strategy expertise.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with 19+ years across multiple domains (embedded, web, infrastructure, cloud)
Proven entrepreneurial experience founding GISCollective and consistent open-source contributions
Strong teaching and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, talks, and community engagement
concerns: No Master's/PhD in AI field; limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise outside recent one-month role at re:cinq
No evidence of strategic customer advisory work or identifying market differentiation opportunities
Career shows broad technical versatility but lacks focused depth in AI platforms or strategic cloud product development

key_factors.factor: Strategic advisory and product vision experience missing
